/usr/bin/c++ -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/storm-discord-rpc.dir/link.d "CMakeFiles/storm-discord-rpc.dir/src/main_working.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/storm-discord-rpc.dir/home/abrakadam/Storm_Discord_RPC/shared/src/discord_rpc_python.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/storm-discord-rpc.dir/home/abrakadam/Storm_Discord_RPC/shared/src/discord_rpc_real_impl.cpp.o" "CMakeFiles/storm-discord-rpc.dir/home/abrakadam/Storm_Discord_RPC/shared/src/config_manager.cpp.o" -o storm-discord-rpc  -lgtkmm-4.0 -lpangomm-2.48 -lgiomm-2.68 -lglibmm-2.68 -lcairomm-1.16 -lsigc-3.0 -lgtk-4 -lpangocairo-1.0 -lpango-1.0 -lharfbuzz -lgdk_pixbuf-2.0 -lcairo-gobject -lcairo -lgraphene-1.0 -lgio-2.0 -lgobject-2.0 -lglib-2.0 -lvulkan
